svg.title: PINN architecture for chip thermal prediction
svg.desc: A fully-connected neural network with 2 inputs, 4 hidden layers of 64 neurons each with Tanh activation, and 1 output, trained with three loss terms.
svg.text: Loss = W_pde · L_pde + W_bc · L_bc + W_data · L_data

g.text: Adam optimizer · lr=1e-3 · StepLR(2000, γ=0.5) · Xavier init
